title: AI Learning Roadmap — your personal study plan, designed by AI | Hitorigoto Lab
description: Tell us your goal, your starting point, and the time you have. AI designs a study roadmap made just for you and delivers it as a PDF.
ogTitle: AI Learning Roadmap — a study plan made for you
ogDescription: What to start with, what to skip, when to do what. Zero time wasted deciding.
headline:
The hardest part of self-study
is deciding what to do.
lead: English, certifications, programming, a new skill for side income — have you ever set out to start, only to lose the whole day just researching materials? This service asks only three things — your goal, where you are now, and the time you can spare — and AI designs a study roadmap made just for you and delivers it as a PDF.
cta: Order now — start your custom roadmap →
ctaNote: Payment is handled on Stripe's secure checkout. Your card details never touch our servers.

card.title: 📍 AI Learning Roadmap
card.blurb: Tell us your goal, your current level, and the time you can spare, and AI designs a study roadmap made just for you, delivered as a PDF by email. What to start with, what to skip, when to do what — zero time wasted deciding.

deliver.title: 🫧 We mirror your situation first
deliver.body: We restate the goal, starting point, and constraints you gave us — "here's what we understood" — so we never design on a wrong premise, and never reduce your goal to generic advice.

deliver.title: 📍 A map from where you are to your goal
deliver.body: A structural overview of what it takes to reach the goal, and what's missing right now.

deliver.title: 🗓 A weekly plan
deliver.body: A realistic, week-by-week to-do list that fits the weekly time you said you have.

deliver.title: ✂️ A "don't-do" list
deliver.body: The materials and detours your goal doesn't need, named explicitly — so we cut the hesitation up front.

deliver.title: ⚠️ Pitfalls, handled in advance
deliver.body: Where learners with the same goal tend to drop off, and how to avoid it.

deliver.title: ✅ A progress checklist
deliver.body: The milestones that tell you, at a glance, "once you're here, move on."

steps: Answer 3 questions at checkout (your goal / your current level / the time you can spare each week).
AI designs a one-off roadmap from your answers alone.
Within 24 hours (usually minutes), the PDF arrives at the email you used at checkout.
target: You want to start studying but don't know where to begin
You feel researching materials and methods is a waste of time
You want a realistic plan that fits around work and family
You want to retry a field you once gave up on — this time with a plan

faq.a: We assume self-study goals that are achievable on your own — languages, certifications, programming, business skills, and the like. If a topic is too specialized for us to design a quality roadmap, we refund in full.

faq.q: How is this different from free AI chat?
faq.a: Chat answers whatever you ask, but what to ask is up to you. This product first confirms your situation — "here's what we understood" — then delivers a finished plan addressed to you, following a format built for study design: the right questions, structure, and checklists, so no hesitation remains. Not a generic answer; a one-off made for you, right now.
Because this is a digital product, we can't accept returns after delivery. But if the generated content has a problem, we'll regenerate it for free or refund you in full. Just contact us.
Check your spam folder first. If it's been more than 24 hours, contact us and we'll confirm and resend.

aiNote: This is an AI-generated digital product. Content is designed automatically from the information you provide, and we don't guarantee specific learning outcomes after delivery.
